items.title: Iran's Khamenei attends first public event since war with Israel | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:

items.author: Reuters
items.content:

items.content:

items.title: Flash flooding hits Texas
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Thunderstorms and torrential rain triggered deadly flash flooding along the Guadalupe River in south-central Texas, killing an unspecified number of people and leaving numerous others missing, according to local authorities.
  
#texas #rain #flood #guadaluperiver #river #climate #environment
